prestazioni: Engine: Theta II T-GDi (G4KF) 2.0L turbocharged inline-4 with a forged crankshaft upgrade from Manley Performance (87mm stroke, 4340 steel) and Carrillo H-beam connecting rods (6.123" length) to handle 400+ WHP reliably. Pair with a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R, 62mm compressor inducer) on a custom Precision Turbo & Engine cast manifold with V-band exhaust housing for optimized spool and top-end flow.

Fuel System: Injector Dynamics ID1050x fuel injectors (1050cc/min) with a Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup (PN 20-0118) to prevent oil blow-by into the intake tract. Upgrade to a Walbro 450LPH in-tank fuel pump (PN F90000267) and pair with a Syvecs S6Plus standalone ECU for full flex-fuel (E85) compatibility and closed-loop boost control (up to 28psi).

Drivetrain & Cooling: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (1.5-way) for the 6-speed manual transmission (M6CF3), paired with a South Bend Clutch Stage 3 Daily disc (2400lb clamp load) and a PRL Motorsports short shifter (25% reduction in throw). Install a Mishimoto X-Line aluminum radiator (PN HY-1318) with dual 12" SPAL fans (PN VA30-AP70/LL) and a Setrab 50-row oil cooler (PN 50-34002) to maintain temps under track use.
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (PN RB-WB-001) with custom carbon fiber overfenders (2.5" wider front, 3" wider rear) to fit 295/30/19 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires on Volk Racing TE37SL wheels (19x9.5 +15 front, 19x11 +25 rear). Front splitter from Seibon Carbon (PN HY-08-GC-SPLITTER) with a custom 3D-printed aluminum support brace, and a custom 3-piece carbon fiber GT wing from APR Performance (PN CF1000) with adjustable mounts for 0-15° angle tuning.

Exterior: Full respray in Hyundai Racing Yellow (code: Y1C) with a 3M Matte Black vinyl wrap on the roof and pillars. Replace all OEM badging with carbon fiber replicas from 3D Carbon (PN 3D-100001) and install a custom LED taillight setup from Diode Dynamics (PN HY2120200) with sequential turn signals. Front bumper mesh grilles replaced with custom laser-cut aluminum units from Custom Car Grills (PN HY-GC-2.0T).

Interior: Full Recaro SPG XL bucket seats (PN 381 205 40) with custom red Alcantara inserts and Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses (PN 41400.95). Replace the OEM steering wheel with a Momo Prototipo (PN 0111200) wrapped in Nappa leather with a quick-release hub from NRG Innovations (PN SRK-100B). Install a custom aluminum gauge pod from Defi (PN DF13801) housing a 3-gauge setup (boost, oil temp, oil pressure) with carbon fiber trim from Seibon (PN HY-08-GC-GAUGE).
